description: Wave 52 rigor-audit-per-wave rule applied. Selected theros-pantheon as audit target — wave 74 commission, triple-attribution corpus member, 18 corpus anchors, structurally significant as the corpus's first multicolor enchantment-creature pantheon node. Audit checklist: (1) anchor-count drift: appears_on lists 18 cards, all on-disk and matching frontmatter — no drift. (2) Canonical sourcing: MTG Wiki Theros Pantheon page, WoTC set design articles, Scryfall per-god pages, Theros Beyond Death story summary — all canonical primary sources, no AI-influencer-blog citations. (3) YAML safety: frontmatter parses cleanly; aliases array is valid; appears_on paths are absolute-style POSIX. (4) Wikilink validity: spot-checked [[Bulk Graph Bundler]], [[labor]], [[rebellion]], [[stewardship]], [[eldrazi]] cross-edges — all resolve to existing nodes. No drift found. Audit-confirm pass.
audit_findings: No drift. theros-pantheon node is structurally sound at wave 76. Recommend continuing rigor-audit cadence at one-per-wave; next candidates: aether-rangers (wave 73, triple-attribution sibling) or xenoverse-villains (wave 75, triple-corpus newest member).
